matrix.source_summary: explicitly named in all 10 competitor feature lists
explicit in gusto, justworks, bamboohr, deel, adp, paylocity, hibob, paychex feature lists
explicit only in gusto and paylocity feature lists; implied by electronic payroll processing in others
explicit in gusto, justworks (4,000+ tax localities), adp (SmartCompliance), paychex; implied by US payroll scope in others
explicit in rippling, deel, bamboohr, workday, adp; gusto limited to global contractors only
explicit only in justworks ('off-cycle payments') and deel ('off-cycle payroll') feature lists
explicit in gusto ('multiple pay rates and schedules'), justworks ('multiple pay rates'), bamboohr ('multi-rate pay')
explicit in bamboohr and paylocity; partial via gusto wallet earned-wage access and deel contractor advance
explicit in gusto ('w-2 filing', '1099-nec filing') and justworks ('w-2 and 1099 filings'); implied by tax filing in most others
explicit only in gusto feature list; not mentioned by name in any other competitor source
explicit in gusto (domestic + global), rippling, justworks, deel, adp feature lists
explicit in rippling, justworks, deel, bamboohr; gusto confirmed absent; adp/paychex imply via HR outsourcing not explicit EOR SKU
explicit in rippling, justworks, deel, adp, paychex feature lists; gusto confirmed absent
explicit in bamboohr ('employee records'), hibob ('core hr system of record'), deel ('hris'), workday ('hcm'); all HRIS-listed vendors confirm
explicit in gusto, rippling, justworks, deel, bamboohr, adp, paylocity, hibob, paychex; workday implied by HCM scope

explicit in gusto ('health benefits administration'), justworks ('medical insurance administration'), adp ('group health insurance'), paychex ('health insurance administration'); inferred from 'benefits administration' in rippling, bamboohr, paylocity, hibob
explicit in justworks feature list; gusto health brokerage known to include dental/vision; inferred from 'benefits administration' across rippling, bamboohr, paylocity, hibob, adp, paychex

explicit in gusto ('401(k) plans'), justworks ('401k administration'), adp ('retirement plans'), paychex ('401(k) & retirement plans'); rippling via Human Interest integration; bamboohr lists '401k integration' (third-party); paylocity via Fidelity/Vanguard/Principal integrations

explicit in gusto ('workers' compensation administration'), justworks ('workers compensation'), adp ('workers' compensation insurance'), paychex ('workers' compensation insurance'); not mentioned for majority of sources
explicit in justworks ('cobra administration'), bamboohr (feature listed + Anuvi COBRA integration), paylocity ('cobra administration'); not present in most other source feature lists

explicit in justworks ('hsa accounts', 'fsa accounts') and paylocity ('fsa / hsa administration'); gusto lists 'financial benefits' broadly without specifying; rippling inferred from comprehensive 'benefits administration'
explicit in gusto ('life and disability benefits'); inferred from 'benefits administration' in bamboohr, paylocity, hibob, adp; paychex lists 'voluntary benefits' without specifying life/disability

explicit in bamboohr ('compensation management'), paylocity ('compensation management'), hibob ('compensation cycle workflows'), workday ('incentive compensation management'); rippling and deel partial via headcount planning and equity management

explicit in deel ('salary benchmarking'), bamboohr ('compensation benchmarking'), hibob ('compensation benchmarking powered by Mercer'); workday via Compa Technologies integration listed as marketplace partner
explicit in bamboohr ('salary bands') and hibob ('customizable pay bands'); workday partial via 'job architecture management'; not present in most other source feature lists

universal coverage: explicit in gusto ('time off management'), justworks ('pto management'), deel ('time off management'), bamboohr ('time-off management'), hibob ('leave tracking and policy enforcement'), adp ('leave case management'), paylocity, paychex; workday via workforce management

explicit across gusto ('time tracking'), rippling ('time & attendance'), justworks ('advanced time tracking'), deel ('time and attendance tracking'), bamboohr, adp, paylocity, hibob, paychex; workday via 'workforce management'

explicit in gusto ('time scheduling'), rippling ('employee scheduling'), adp ('optimized scheduling'), paylocity ('scheduling'); workday partial via 'frontline workforce solutions'; not listed for justworks, deel, bamboohr, hibob, paychex

explicit in gusto ('employee onboarding'), rippling ('automated onboarding & offboarding'), justworks ('online employee onboarding and offboarding'), deel ('onboarding and offboarding workflows'), bamboohr, paylocity, hibob, paychex; workday partial via 'self-service hr agent' and 'employee document management'

explicit in bamboohr ('employee self-service'), paylocity ('employee self-service'), hibob ('employee self-service'), workday ('self-service hr agent'); gusto via 'gusto employee app' + 'employee self-onboarding'; justworks and paychex via mobile app only
deel feature list, Workday 'employee document management', HiBob 'esign and document management', Paylocity 'document management'; justworks has 'document center' only
explicitly listed in gusto ('expenses and reimbursements'), rippling, justworks, deel, paylocity, paychex feature lists; Workday via 'spend management'
ADP 'wage garnishment management' and Paylocity 'garnishment management' explicitly listed; absent or unconfirmed in all other sources
ADP 'employment verification' and Paylocity 'i-9 verification, e-verify integration' explicitly listed; not confirmed in other sources
deel, bamboohr, paychex feature lists; justworks and paylocity via Checkr integration only
only deel.com explicitly lists 'immigration support' and 'global mobility' as named features
deel 'multi-currency payments' explicit; rippling, Workday, ADP via global payroll; gusto/justworks limited to global contractor payments
only deel.com explicitly lists 'bulk payments' as a named feature; absent or unconfirmed in all other sources
rippling 'automated compliance', justworks 'federal and state compliance alerts', deel 'compliance monitoring', ADP 'SmartCompliance platform', paychex 'tax compliance services'
paylocity 'general ledger integration', deel QuickBooks/Xero/NetSuite, justworks 'accounting software integrations', ADP 'erp integrations', rippling Rillet integration
rippling 'App Shop', Workday 'Workday Marketplace', ADP 'app marketplace', paychex 'software integrations marketplace', hibob 'marketplace integrations', bamboohr '150+ pre-built integrations'
gusto 'Embedded Payroll API', deel 'api access', bamboohr 'api', paylocity 'open api / developer platform', hibob 'public api', paychex 'Paychex Flex API marketplace'
only hibob explicitly lists 'webhooks' as a named feature; not mentioned in any other source scraped
deel 'sso', bamboohr 'sso' with Google/Microsoft/SAML, paylocity 'single sign-on (sso)', rippling 'identity & access management'
ADP 'erp integrations', deel NetSuite/SAP integrations, paylocity Microsoft Dynamics/NetSuite, Workday is itself an ERP with external integrations; rippling only Rillet
Gusto features list (Gusto Embedded Payroll API) and ADP features list (embedded payroll + software provider embedded payroll API)
Gusto (Gus), Rippling AI, Deel AI, BambooHR AI, Workday Sana/Paradox, HiBob Bob AI Companion all explicitly named in features lists
Workday (HiredScore AI recruiting) and Paychex (Recruiting Copilot powered by Findem) explicitly named; Paylocity lists AI-assisted HR tools alongside ATS
Deel features list (contractor misclassification check); Rippling has a misclassification quiz tool but framed as self-service, not AI detection
HiBob features list explicitly names ai-powered pay insights; no other source uses this term or equivalent
Workday (responsible AI framework as differentiator) and ADP (responsible ai governance in features list) both explicitly name this
Deel (RBAC explicitly named), Paylocity (role-based access control explicitly named), Rippling (permissions management listed as standalone feature)
Deel features list explicitly names two-factor authentication; Rippling lists 1Password and Yubikey integrations implying MFA support; no other sources confirm
Rippling lists identity & access management as an explicit product pillar; Deel, BambooHR, and Paylocity offer SSO and Okta/Azure AD integrations indicating partial IAM
Rippling (device management explicit feature) and Deel (IT device management explicit feature); Gusto and BambooHR have software provisioning/IT offboarding automation only
HiBob features list explicitly names custom fields; Workday Extend implies customization capability; no other sources confirm or deny
Paylocity features list explicitly names multi-entity / multi-company support; no other sources confirm or deny this specific capability by name
HiBob features list explicitly names multi-language support; global products (Rippling, Deel, BambooHR, Workday, ADP) imply it but do not confirm in scraped content
BambooHR features list explicitly names custom dashboards; most competitors list analytics/reporting in features but do not confirm dashboard customization specifically
Justworks and Deel features lists both explicitly name org chart; absent from Gusto features list; other sources do not confirm or deny
BambooHR features list (employee gifting/recognition), Workday features list (employee recognition & rewards), Paylocity features list (employee recognition)
Gusto and Justworks features lists (hr resource center); Paychex Worx content hub is adjacent but not a true HR resources center
Justworks features list (calendar and directory explicitly); Deel has org chart only; BambooHR has time-off calendar only
Rippling (Workflow Studio), Deel (workflow automation), BambooHR (workflows and approvals), Workday (orchestrations & integrations), HiBob (workflow automation) all confirm
Gusto features list (payroll approvals explicitly); BambooHR has general approvals; HiBob has compensation cycle workflows
Gusto (software provisioning) and Rippling (identity & access management, device management) confirm; Deel has IT device management; BambooHR has IT offboarding/onboarding automation
Rippling (policy enforcement, differentiators) and HiBob (leave tracking and policy enforcement) confirm; Justworks/ADP/Paychex partial via compliance tooling
Rippling features list (team chat); Paylocity Community is adjacent social layer; Zstack has ZergChat
Rippling, Workday (Peakon), Paylocity, HiBob, and Paychex all confirm via features lists
Workday features list only (360 feedback explicitly); no other source confirms
Justworks (custom reporting), BambooHR (custom report builder), Workday (hr analytics & reporting) confirm; most others have general reporting
Workday, Paylocity (people analytics explicit), HiBob (real-time people analytics, talent analytics) confirm; most others have general analytics
BambooHR features list (hr benchmarks explicitly); HiBob has Mercer compensation benchmarking; Deel has salary benchmarking
Rippling (headcount planning), Deel (headcount planning), Workday (workforce planning), HiBob (workforce scenario planning + headcount planning) all confirm
Paylocity (labor cost tracking explicit), ADP (labor forecasting and budgeting) confirm; Gusto/Rippling/HiBob/Paychex have adjacent cost or workforce cost features
Workday features list (financial planning & analysis explicit); HiBob features list (connected 3-statement models, FP&A explicit); all others partial via workforce/people analytics only
Gusto, Justworks, BambooHR, Paylocity, Paychex all explicit in scraped features; others not confirmed in scraped content
Gusto, BambooHR, ADP, Paylocity, Paychex all list ATS explicitly; Justworks/Rippling list integrations or recruiting without native ATS confirmation
Gusto, Rippling, BambooHR, Workday, ADP, Paylocity, HiBob all list performance management explicitly in scraped features
Rippling, Paylocity, Paychex list LMS explicitly; BambooHR lists LMS integration (not native); Justworks and Deel list training content without full LMS
Paylocity is the only explicit listing; Workday and ADP implied via talent management umbrella only
HiBob lists skills management explicitly; Workday implied via talent management; all others absent from scraped content
BambooHR lists compliance training explicitly; Justworks lists harassment prevention training; Rippling has automated compliance (not training content)
Justworks and Paychex list HR consulting explicitly; Gusto and ADP offer HR resource/outsourcing services without dedicated consulting branding
Gusto and BambooHR list offer letters explicitly; Deel offers compliant contract generation (close partial); most others not confirmed in scraped content
BambooHR lists interview scheduling explicitly; Gusto lists interview scorecards (scheduling not confirmed); most sources not confirmed in scraped content
Deel lists global mobility and immigration support explicitly; all others absent or unconfirmed in scraped content
Rippling is the only source with business travel management listed explicitly in scraped features
Gusto lists R&D tax credits and EITC identification explicitly; ADP lists business tax credits explicitly; all others absent from scraped content
ADP lists labor forecasting and budgeting explicitly; Workday lists workforce planning and operational planning; HiBob lists headcount planning, vendor forecasting, and BvA explicitly
